compiled_state.title: MCP reconcile: bootstrap modes mutate real Jira ungated, even under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
MCP reconcile tool runs Jira-MUTATING bootstrap modes with zero gating, even under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1. Verified LIVE (incident, remediated): a reconcile call with mode=bootstrap-strict from a sandboxed temp store, readonly server, executed against real Jira and created 19 real issues (DIG-5615..DIG-5633; all deleted, deletion verified by JQL).

## Reproduction Steps
(verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD)
1. Export REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1 and build the MCP server (build_server()).
2. Call tool reconcile with {"mode": "bootstrap-strict"} (acli installed + credentialed).
3. Observe the pass runs and applies real Jira mutations (OK: applied 10 of 993).

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: any Jira-mutating mode requires REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=1; a readonly server exposes at most reconcile-check/dry-run.
- Actual: bootstrap-strict/bootstrap-throttle mutate real Jira ungated under readonly; only mode=="live" is checked.

## Source
- src/rebar/mcp_server.py:271-276 — gate checks only the literal string "live".
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/mode.py:106-112 — MODE_CAPS: BOOTSTRAP_STRICT=10, BOOTSTRAP_THROTTLE=100 APPLIED mutations/pass; only RECONCILE_CHECK/DRY_RUN are cap-0.
- Note dry-run is not a pure read either: it writes bridge_state/ and the invariants path files local bug tickets.

## Fix direction
Gate by capability, not string: parse the mode via the Mode enum and require the env var for any mode whose MODE_CAPS != 0; under _readonly(), restrict reconcile to cap-0 modes (or hide it). Correct docstrings + CLAUDE.md ("'live' mutates Jira" is dangerously incomplete — also __init__.py:404-409, tracked with bug frog-oryx-strut).

## Suggested RED test
Parametrize all five modes x {readonly, non-readonly} x {with, without REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE} with a fake acli on PATH that fails loudly if executed; assert only cap-0 modes pass without the env var and that readonly blocks mutating modes before any acli invocation. Never real credentials in tests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bootstrap-strict/bootstrap-throttle (and live) require REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=1 over MCP
- [ ] Under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1 no Jira-mutating reconcile mode is callable
- [ ] Invalid mode strings produce a clean tool error (not a crash)
- [ ] RED test matrix above lands first and goes GREEN with the fix
- [ ] Docstrings/CLAUDE.md updated to name all mutating modes

comments.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (fix mechanics experimentally validated in sandbox, 2026-06-09):
Mode parse API: rebar_reconciler/mode.py exposes Mode.from_str(value) -> Mode (classmethod; raises ValueError listing allowed values). Import works in-process in mcp_server.py with NO sys.path work: `import rebar` (already at module top) transitively imports rebar._native which puts the engine dir on sys.path, so `from rebar_reconciler.mode import MODE_CAPS, Mode` resolves. CRITICAL: MODE_CAPS[Mode.LIVE] is None (uncapped) — gate on `!= 0`, NOT `> 0`.
Validated replacement for the mode gate in the reconcile tool body:
    from rebar_reconciler.mode import MODE_CAPS, Mode
    parsed = Mode.from_str(mode)  # ValueError on unknown mode -> clean tool error
    if MODE_CAPS[parsed] != 0:    # any mutating mode (10/100/None)
        if _readonly():
            raise ValueError(f"{parsed.value} reconcile is disabled: this server is read-only (REBAR_MCP_READONLY)")
        if os.environ.get("REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE","").strip().lower() not in ("1","true","yes"):
            raise ValueError(f"{parsed.value} reconcile is disabled (mutating mode); set REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=1 to enable")
    return rebar.reconcile(parsed.value)
PINNED WORDING TRAP: tests/interfaces/test_mcp.py::test_live_reconcile_refused_without_optin pins the substring "live reconcile is disabled" — keep "<mode> reconcile is disabled" phrasing or update that test deliberately.
Validated matrix: 4x6 (READONLY x ALLOW_LIVE x five modes + "bogus"), engine monkeypatch-recorder + loud fake acli (never invoked). Baseline confirmed bootstrap-* AND "bogus" reached the engine ungated. Patched: cap-0 modes always allowed; readonly blocks mutating modes EVEN WITH ALLOW_LIVE=1; bogus -> clean error. test_mcp.py + test_surface.py: 11 passed.
Coordination: if landed with bug ship-mogul-glob, this diff already lowercases ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE — that ticket's hunk for it is superseded.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

file_impact.reason: gate reconcile modes by MODE_CAPS + readonly

verify_commands.dd_text: No Jira-mutating reconcile mode callable without REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE; readonly blocks mutating modes
